name: aggregate
description: Aggregates a list using an aggregate function (count, sum, avg, min, max, json_agg, json_agg_strict), optionally grouping by attributes. Supports distinct flag and having clause for post-group filtering.

applyTo.description: The list to aggregate. The actual type is set by the platform depending on interpolation for the transformer.

function.description: The aggregate function to apply. Defaults to count (with legacy 'aggregate' result key) when omitted.

attribute.description: The attribute to aggregate on. Required for sum, avg, min, max, json_agg, json_agg_strict. For count with distinct, specifies which attribute to count distinct values of.

distinct.description: When true, only distinct values of attribute are considered. Primarily used with count.

having.description: A boolean transformer evaluated for each group after aggregation. The aggregate result is available as 'aggregateValue' in the context. Groups where this evaluates to false are excluded.

attributeObject.description: For json_agg and json_agg_strict: build an object for each row using this map (output key → source attribute name). Maps to JSON_BUILD_OBJECT in SQL. Takes precedence over 'attribute' for json_agg/json_agg_strict.
